name: Natl Windows - Get Serviceable Zip Codes by Division

content.query:
/** Get the zip codes for FHIA **/
SELECT 
brz.[ZipCode]
,brz.[LP_BranchID]
,prg.[ProductGroup]
,brz.[Division]
 FROM 
 [EDW].[DIM_BRANCH_ZIP] brz
 ,[EDW].[DIM_PRODUCT_GROUP] prg
 where
 brz.ProductGroupID = prg.ProductGroupID
 and brz.Division = 'FHI'
 and ZipCode not in ('00000')
 and prg.[Active] = 'True'
 --and prg.ProductGroupID in ('SWR-BRem','SWR-WABth')
 order BY
prg.[ProductGroup]
,brz.[LP_BranchID]
,brz.[ZipCode]


/** Get the zip codes for Paradise **/

SELECT 
brz.[ZipCode]
,brz.[LP_BranchID]
,prg.[ProductGroup]
,brz.[Division]
 FROM 
 [EDW].[DIM_BRANCH_ZIP] brz
 ,[EDW].[DIM_PRODUCT_GROUP] prg
 where
 brz.ProductGroupID = prg.ProductGroupID
 and brz.Division = 'PHI'
 and ZipCode not in ('00000')
 and prg.[Active] = 'True'
 and prg.ProductGroup in ('Default')
 order BY
prg.[ProductGroup]
,brz.[LP_BranchID]
,brz.[ZipCode]

/** Get the zip codes for Statewide **/

SELECT distinct
brz.[ZipCode]
,brz.[LP_BranchID]
,prg.[ProductGroup]
,brz.[Division]
 FROM 
 [EDW].[DIM_BRANCH_ZIP] brz
 ,[EDW].[DIM_BRANCH] brn
 ,[EDW].[DIM_PRODUCT_GROUP] prg
 where
 brz.ProductGroupID = prg.ProductGroupID
 and brz.BranchID = brn.BranchID
 and brz.Division = 'SWR'
 and ZipCode not in ('00000')
 and prg.[Active] = 'True'
 and brn.[Active] = 'True'
 and prg.ProductGroupID in ('SWR-WinSd')
 order BY
prg.[ProductGroup]
,brz.[LP_BranchID]
,brz.[ZipCode]



/** Get the zip codes for MaxHome **/

SELECT 
brz.[ZipCode]
,brz.[LP_BranchID]
,prg.[ProductGroup]
,brz.[Division]
 FROM 
 [EDW].[DIM_BRANCH_ZIP] brz
 ,[EDW].[DIM_PRODUCT_GROUP] prg
 where
 brz.ProductGroupID = prg.ProductGroupID
 and brz.Division = 'MXH'
 and ZipCode not in ('00000')
 and prg.[Active] = 'True'
 and prg.ProductGroupID in ('MXH-WND')
 and brz.BranchID not in ('MXH-HUB')
 order BY
prg.[ProductGroup]
,brz.[LP_BranchID]
,brz.[ZipCode]


/** Get the zip codes for RTW **/

SELECT 
brz.[ZipCode]
,brz.[LP_BranchID]
,prg.[ProductGroup]
,brz.[Division]
 FROM 
 [EDW].[DIM_BRANCH_ZIP] brz
 ,[EDW].[DIM_PRODUCT_GROUP] prg
 where
 brz.ProductGroupID = prg.ProductGroupID
 and brz.Division = 'RTW'
 and ZipCode not in ('00000','0')
 and prg.[Active] = 'True'
 and prg.ProductGroupID in ('RTW-DEF')
 order BY
prg.[ProductGroup]
,brz.[LP_BranchID]
,brz.[ZipCode]
